compounds.frequency: every 4-5 days to every 1-2 weeks, as needed

benefits.description: Sexual arousal and performance enhancement; arousal from basic visual stimuli; can perform multiple rounds; effects last about 48 hours

side_effects.description: Prolonged erection (skin-splitting erection for 6 hours after 1mg dose; woke up in middle of night with raging boner; still hard next morning)

protocol_notes: User is already tan, so not using MT2. Uses PT-141 for performance rather than necessity. Started with 1mg (reported as too much); adjusted to 0.5mg. Initial side effects (nausea, flush) occur 10-15 minutes post-injection, lasting 20-30 minutes. Full arousal effects occur a few hours later.
